startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Optional list of Monaqasat listing URLs to crawl.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max requests
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Safety cap for early test runs.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Keep this low for the government portal.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max request retries
maxRequestRetries.description: Use a low value while testing network reachability.

useApifyProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useApifyProxy.description: Enable Apify Proxy for geography/access tests.

apifyProxyGroups.title: Apify Proxy groups
apifyProxyGroups.description: Optional Apify Proxy groups, for example RESIDENTIAL if available on the account.

apifyProxyCountryCode.title: Proxy country code
apifyProxyCountryCode.description: Optional ISO country code, for example QA for Qatar or AE for UAE.
